title: HappyValley
subtitle: Enterprise Backend Service
description: A comprehensive and scalable enterprise-grade backend system for managing services, bookings, and subscriptions. Built with a modular architecture designed for high performance, maintainability, and seamless scalability. Powers a live concierge service platform.
highlights: AI-powered grocery bot using OpenAI GPT-4o
Stripe subscriptions & one-time payments
Real-time bidirectional communication via Socket.io
Multi-provider social login (Google/Facebook) via Passport.js
Push notifications via Twilio & Firebase

title: Asetta Autos
subtitle: MERN Vehicle Marketplace
description: A full-stack vehicle marketplace platform built with the MERN stack. Designed for smooth browsing, secure transactions, and efficient vehicle management. Features real-time notifications, admin dashboard, and integrated payment flow.
highlights: JWT-secured authentication & role-based access
Real-time notifications via WebSockets
Advanced search & filter by brand, price, category
Admin panel: manage users, listings & approvals
Fully responsive design for mobile & desktop

title: BeautyLuxe
subtitle: E-Commerce MERN App
description: A beauty product e-commerce platform where users can explore, filter, and purchase beauty products. Features JWT authentication, cart management, Firebase login, and a full admin panel for product and order management.
highlights: Firebase authentication + JWT API security
Product CRUD with image upload
Cart, checkout & order tracking
Admin dashboard for product management
Mobile-first responsive design

title: SpeakEasy Academy
subtitle: Language Learning Platform
description: A role-based language learning platform with Students, Instructors, and Admins. Students browse and purchase foreign language classes, instructors manage their courses, and admins approve/reject class submissions with real-time feedback.
highlights: Three-tier role system: Student, Instructor, Admin
Stripe payment integration for class enrollment
Instructor course creation & management
Admin approval workflow with feedback
Protected routes with JWT & Firebase Auth

title: Photopia Backend & Admin Portal
subtitle: On-Demand Media Booking & Web Dashboard
description: A comprehensive backend system and administrative dashboard powering an on-demand photography platform. Responsible for designing the core database models, REST/WebSocket APIs, and building the Next.js admin dashboard to manage bookings, payments, and service categories.
highlights: Built Next.js admin dashboard for managing service categories, themes, and platform metrics
Implemented Stripe Connect split-payment logic for automated professional earnings payouts
Designed and documented RESTful APIs to facilitate seamless frontend and mobile integrations
Built real-time notification scheduling and bidirectional Socket.io messaging engine
Structured secure media uploads using AWS S3 presigned URLs for efficient storage

title: Photopia - Mobile Integration
subtitle: On-Demand Booking & Media API Collaboration
description: Designed the backend architecture, incremental sync protocols, and secure checkout endpoints to support the Photopia mobile platform. Collaborated closely with the Flutter development team, providing API integrations and offline caching layers for the mobile app.
highlights: Created incremental offline sync protocols for caching Hadith libraries and articles locally
Implemented secure payment intent generation supporting Card and SEPA Direct Debit checkout
Supported mobile chat system with real-time Socket.io endpoints and FCM push notifications
Built custom 'Modify Offer' API allowing negotiations on pending bookings from the mobile app
Collaborated with the Flutter team (who built the client app) to optimize mobile-to-backend data flows
